title: aralia elata var. glabrescens
intro: Aralia elata var. glabrescens, also known as Japanese angelica tree or Chinese angelica tree, is a plant species belonging to the Araliaceae family. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include its potential to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote digestion, as well as its use in treating respiratory and skin conditions. In herbal preparations, Aralia elata var. glabrescens is often combined with other herbs to create teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to support overall health and well-being.
